'''vongalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:eyelashed|eyelashed]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-ng-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eyelashed|eyelashed]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vongalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vongalithi|vongalithi]] || [[word:vongaliji|vongaliji]] || [[word:vongalishi|vongalishi]] || [[word:vongaliki|vongaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vongaluthuthu|vongaluthuthu]] || [[word:vongalujuju|vongalujuju]] || [[word:vongalushushu|vongalushushu]] || [[word:vongalukuku|vongalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vongaluthu|vongaluthu]] || [[word:vongaluju|vongaluju]] || [[word:vongalushu|vongalushu]] || [[word:vongaluku|vongaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vongalufthuf|vongalufthuf]] || [[word:vongalufjuf|vongalufjuf]] || [[word:vongalufshuf|vongalufshuf]] || [[word:vongalufkuf|vongalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vongalethe|vongalethe]] || [[word:vongaleje|vongaleje]] || [[word:vongaleshe|vongaleshe]] || [[word:vongaleke|vongaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vongalothotho|vongalothotho]] || [[word:vongalojojo|vongalojojo]] || [[word:vongaloshosho|vongaloshosho]] || [[word:vongalokoko|vongalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vongalotho|vongalotho]] || [[word:vongalojo|vongalojo]] || [[word:vongalosho|vongalosho]] || [[word:vongaloko|vongaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vongalofthof|vongalofthof]] || [[word:vongalofjof|vongalofjof]] || [[word:vongalofshof|vongalofshof]] || [[word:vongalofkof|vongalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vongalïfthïf|vongalïfthïf]] || [[word:vongalïfjïf|vongalïfjïf]] || [[word:vongalïfshïf|vongalïfshïf]] || [[word:vongalïfkïf|vongalïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vongalïfthïfthïf|vongalïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:vongalïfjïfjïf|vongalïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:vongalïfshïfshïf|vongalïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:vongalïfkïfkïf|vongalïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vongalïfthïf|vongalïfthïf]] || [[word:vongalïfjïf|vongalïfjïf]] || [[word:vongalïfshïf|vongalïfshïf]] || [[word:vongalïfkïf|vongalïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vongalïfthïf|vongalïfthïf]] || [[word:vongalïfjïf|vongalïfjïf]] || [[word:vongalïfshïf|vongalïfshïf]] || [[word:vongalïfkïf|vongalïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vongalæthæ|vongalæthæ]] || [[word:vongalæjæ|vongalæjæ]] || [[word:vongalæshæ|vongalæshæ]] || [[word:vongalækæ|vongalækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vongalathatha|vongalathatha]] || [[word:vongalajaja|vongalajaja]] || [[word:vongalashasha|vongalashasha]] || [[word:vongalakaka|vongalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vongalatha|vongalatha]] || [[word:vongalaja|vongalaja]] || [[word:vongalasha|vongalasha]] || [[word:vongalaka|vongalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vongalafthaf|vongalafthaf]] || [[word:vongalafjaf|vongalafjaf]] || [[word:vongalafshaf|vongalafshaf]] || [[word:vongalafkaf|vongalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:vongalasha|vongalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:vongalshësha|vongalshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vongalrosha|vongalrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vongalmusha|vongalmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:vongalyasha|vongalyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govongalnkshësha|govongalnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govongalnkrosha|govongalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govongalnkmusha|govongalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govongalnkyasha|govongalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:vongangalasha|vongangalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vongangalshësha|vongangalshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vongangalrosha|vongangalrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vongangalmusha|vongangalmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vongangalyasha|vongangalyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govongangalnkshësha|govongangalnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govongangalnkrosha|govongangalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govongangalnkmusha|govongangalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govongangalnkyasha|govongangalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:vengælasha|vengælasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vengælshësha|vengælshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vengælrosha|vengælrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vengælmusha|vengælmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vengælyasha|vengælyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govengælnkshësha|govengælnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govengælnkrosha|govengælnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govengælnkmusha|govengælnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govengælnkyasha|govengælnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:vongfalasha|vongfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vongfalshësha|vongfalshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vongfalrosha|vongfalrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vongfalmusha|vongfalmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vongfalyasha|vongfalyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govongfalnkshësha|govongfalnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govongfalnkrosha|govongfalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govongfalnkmusha|govongfalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govongfalnkyasha|govongfalnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
